rule_metadata.author: Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: UAC Bypass Using MSConfig Token Modification - File

rules.rule_text:
title: UAC Bypass Using MSConfig Token Modification - File
id: 41bb431f-56d8-4691-bb56-ed34e390906f
status: test
description: Detects the pattern of UAC Bypass using a msconfig GUI hack (UACMe 55)
references:
- https://github.com/hfiref0x/UACME
author: Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
date: 2021-08-30
modified: 2022-10-09
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.t1548.002
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|startswith: C:\Users\
    TargetFilename|endswith: \AppData\Local\Temp\pkgmgr.exe
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
